title: oplismenus colonum var. zonalis
intro: Oplismenus colonum var. zonalis, commonly known as the basket grass or zonal basket grass, is a perennial grass species native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Oplismenus colonum var. zonalis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic agent to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
